She seems to be the best unit for this event Erika stage😭
Use Wanda, the trick is to use Wanda’s 4 cost card when Erika does 10 hits in one single turn.

Use the event’s symphony card on her 4 hits. Plus Hameln’s ult if you’d like so it takes effect multiple times. Then plus Wanda’s ult. Erika will end up doing 1 x 15 hits of damage, because youve reduced her single hit dmg to 1
She only does 15~20 points of dmg on you but you can counter 6000x15 = more than 80k dmg on her in one turn

Use Orla or Ramona, and/or that one key skill that lets you fish any given card from the pool. Or use Orla’s yellow halo to preserve all cards. These help you make sure you have wanda’s 4c whenever you need it
